strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Current role involves TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited demonstrated depth in Kotlin; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms work ~2016-2018)
React experience is present but not deeply detailed; Vitest not explicitly mentioned

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
Missing Nest.js and weak Kotlin signal

response.justification: Candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with a strong full-stack background in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus direct AI-agent and MCP experience that aligns with the role's AI agent development requirement. Engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD) and architectural breadth are well evidenced. Gaps around Nest.js and current Kotlin proficiency are notable but likely bridgeable given the candidate's polyglot history and demonstrated ability to pick up new stacks.
